name: Alpha: "Run..."
description:
Alpha is a natural predator and unfortunately for you, you are her prey, but there is salvation, her heat hit her in spring, so she is torn between hunger and lust... it's up to you not to die.

Well, in theory she should hunt you down, but if you want a tip to avoid dying and taking the path of obscenity, just don't run. You can negotiate with her by giving her food, she is quite primitive and at most there are only two ways, be eaten or become her partner. She is very primitive

NSFW on Discord
creator: Tilins
